overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} { b } { = } { d \times Z _ { r } + o ( d ) \times ( Z _ { w } + C _ { w } + m \times T _ { r } ) } \\ = \underbrace {d \times Z _ {r} + o (d) \times Z _ {w}} _ {\text {depth buffer, B_{z}}} + \underbrace {o (d) \times C _ {w}} _ {\text {color buffer, B_{c}}} + \underbrace {o (d) \times m \times T _ {r}} _ {\text {texture read, B_{t}}} \\ = B _ {d} + B _ {c} + B _ {t}. \tag {18.8} \\ \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} { b } { = } { d \times Z _ { r } + o ( d ) \times ( Z _ { w } + C _ { w } + m \times T _ { r } ) } \\ = \underbrace {d \times Z _ {r} + o (d) \times Z _ {w}} _ {\text {depth buffer, } B_{z}} + \underbrace {o (d) \times C _ {w}} _ {\text {color buffer, } B_{c}} + \underbrace {o (d) \times m \times T _ {r}} _ {\text {texture read, } B_{t}} \\ = B _ {d} + B _ {c} + B _ {t}. \tag {18.8} \\ \end{array}
